description: Lock the first trust-model remediation batch to source-backed chronology and prevent unrelated contextual prerequisites from returning.

checks.reason: The 4000 BC census anchor must not depend on the later formal-arithmetic node.
Clay-tablet enumeration retains its documentary administrative context.
The chronology is anchored to the ONS Babylonian census account.
The rescoped artifact is a bone tool rather than a stone-tool category.
A hide-use context must not become a tool-manufacturing prerequisite.
Bone-tool manufacture remains the direct material method for bone awls.
The node stays anchored to the earliest reviewed Eurasian bone-awl range.
Hippocratic case narratives do not require a public library institution.
Clinical case histories must not be conflated with municipal sanitation records.
Writing preserves the documentary lineage of the Hippocratic corpus.
The review dates Hippocratic case histories to about 400 BC.
Tiered paid admission did not require printed tickets.
Venue zones remain the physical basis for tiered admission.
The scope is anchored to documented London public-theater admissions by 1600.
Cayley's 1799 low-speed aerodynamic work predates formal thermodynamics.
Classical monumental construction is unrelated to aerodynamic science.
The specific bundled math node must not duplicate the sourced general mathematics edge.
Experimental method remains an enabling capability for aerodynamic science.
Quantitative force analysis remains the field's mathematical capability.
The node remains anchored to Cayley's foundational design and force separation.
A neighboring pipe utility is not a causal prerequisite for gas lighting.
Gas lighting can be deployed without an orthogonal street grid.
Manufactured gas supply remains the direct technical enabler.
The public-lighting scope stays anchored to Pall Mall in 1807.
Mercury use must not be laundered into an alchemical process dependency.
The glass vacuum tube remains a direct instrument capability.
Hydrostatic pressure remains the instrument's physical principle.
The barometer stays anchored to Torricelli's 1643 experiment.
